title: Jinja 3.1.6 Environments, Layouts, Autoescape, and Contracts · Retrieval Circuit
summary: A delayed publication review reconstructs jinja 3.1.6 environments, layouts, autoescape, and contracts from revision, configuration, source bytes, document nodes, route manifest, rendered HTML, asset graph, validation report, artifact digest, deployment, and recovery evidence. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for strict autoescaped layout and component system after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging,…
objectives: Create one configured Jinja environment with bounded loader roots, explicit autoescape, StrictUndefined, deterministic globals, and version evidence.
Pass a documented immutable view model instead of filesystem objects, services, secrets, or unrestricted application state.
Use base layouts, blocks, includes, and macros with explicit ownership, required regions, naming, and bounded inheritance.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-static-site-python cumulative production static-site generator portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python parser, route, render, graph, and publication models
with original fixed in-memory fixtures only. Native filesystems, full CommonMark, markdown-it-py,
Jinja, validators, browsers, GitHub Actions, Pages, DNS, TLS, CDN caches, and production effects
require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class PublicationPolicy:
    base_path: str = "/handbook/"
    encoding: str = "utf-8"
    raw_html_allowed: bool = False
    max_document_bytes: int = 262_144
    max_nesting_depth: int = 64


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class BuildEvidence:
    revision: str
    content_manifest_digest: str
    route_manifest_digest: str
    artifact_digest: str
    accessibility_review_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python static-site generator portfolio ready"

steps.title: Static-site publishing and Python Separate evidence from confidence · Review Template Diagnostics
steps.instruction:
review case — A review publishing team handles case 4879 during a project-subpath GitHub Pages deployment. Build deterministic Python evidence to configure strict autoescaped templates with explicit view-model and safe-markup boundaries; reconcile content, routes, navigation, links, assets, feeds, sitemaps, output files, and artifact digests before approval; then rename a titled source while preserving its public identity and redirect evidence. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real filesystems, full CommonMark, markdown-it-py, Jinja, validators, browsers, GitHub Actions, Pages, DNS, TLS, CDN caches, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Turn missing templates, undefined variables, invalid blocks, unsafe values, and source locations into actionable build failures.

Inspect the Template Diagnostics trace for this review case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

steps.title: Static-site publishing and Python Record what required effort · Review Template Diagnostics
steps.instruction:
Write the review evidence note for Template Diagnostics: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A review publishing team handles case 3590 during a large technical reference incremental rebuild. Build deterministic Python evidence to configure strict autoescaped templates with explicit view-model and safe-markup boundaries; retain reader, content owner, revision, configuration, source, parser, route, artifact, deployment, and result identity; then delete a source and change a shared layout, then compare incremental and clean artifact digests. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real filesystems, full CommonMark, markdown-it-py, Jinja, validators, browsers, GitHub Actions, Pages, DNS, TLS, CDN caches, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Turn missing templates, undefined variables, invalid blocks, unsafe values, and source locations into actionable build failures.
